commercial_metadata.description: This is a commercial for Clorox Toilet Bowl Cleaner, from 2013. This cleaning product is used for cleaning and disinfecting toilets.

row.Description: This is a commercial for Clorox Toilet Bowl Cleaner, from 2013. This cleaning product is used for cleaning and disinfecting toilets.

response_text:
A white toilet sits centered in a tidy, old-fashioned bathroom with floral wallpaper, a bathtub on the right, a vanity on the left, a potted plant on the floor, and a toilet paper roll mounted behind it. The scene then moves quickly through many different bathrooms and toilet styles. A mint-green toilet appears in a tiled bathroom, with a dark Clorox bottle on the floor beside it. Next is a childlike yellow-tiled bathroom: a small toilet has a fuzzy blue seat cover, toys and a step stool are scattered nearby, and a little potty seat sits to the right.

A glossy black toilet stands in a more polished bathroom with pale marble flooring and a tall black pedestal sink reflected in a mirror. Then a retro bathroom with orange patterned wallpaper and shag carpet shows only the lower half of a person perched on the toilet, bare feet on the closed lid, wearing a colorful robe or garment; a Clorox container sits on the floor near the vanity. A deep red toilet follows in a narrow bathroom with textured white walls, a fern on the floor, a red wastebasket, and a Clorox toilet cleaner bottle standing near the base.

The images continue with a plain modern toilet against a wood-paneled wall, flanked by a toilet paper stand and a sculptural white vase, with a blue Clorox bottle on the floor. A white urinal appears in a public restroom stall with green tile behind it. Outdoors, a rustic wooden outhouse stands among dense greenery, with a crescent moon cut into its door and a wheelbarrow and shovel nearby. Another institutional-looking toilet is mounted low in a stark concrete corner, with chain fixtures on the wall and a metal fence along one side.

More toilets appear in varied home settings: a small bathroom with a sink in the foreground, slippers on the floor, and a compact toilet at the back; a white tiled bathroom with a high tank, a wooden toilet seat, a basin on the floor, and a Clorox bottle nearby; and a sleek metallic wall-mounted toilet set into a dark blue tiled alcove. A white toilet with a black seat is shown in a tiled bathroom beside a pedestal sink and a stacked toilet paper holder. Another toilet is tucked into a narrow space between tall stacks of books, with a plant behind it, a pink toilet brush, and a tan seat cover.

A toilet with shiny gold-colored seat and lid stands in a marble-walled bathroom with a gold-toned toilet paper holder. In a wood-paneled bathroom, a pink toilet seat with a simple face-like design on the lid is visible, and a Dalmatian dog stands in the foreground looking off to the side. The montage then shifts to active cleaning: in a public restroom, a person wearing blue gloves wipes the outside of a small white toilet with a cloth. Cleaning supplies sit on the floor, including a caddy and a Clorox-branded bottle.

A white toilet in a floral-wallpapered bathroom is shown with a Clorox bottle on the floor nearby, along with a plunger and pink robe or towel hanging to the side. A pale blue toilet appears in a pastel-tiled bathroom beside a blue bathtub and shower. Then a person in cuffed jeans and white shoes holds a blue Clorox toilet bowl cleaner bottle over an open toilet bowl, applying the cleaner inside the rim. Another bright bathroom shows a white toilet with its lid up, a plunger beside it, folded towels stacked on shelves to the right, and a Clorox product placed high on the shelf.

The sequence continues with a vintage pink toilet against green and black tile, accompanied by a scale and wastebasket. In a wood-paneled, old-fashioned bathroom, a small white toilet with a wooden seat stands near a claw-foot bathtub; only the lower half of a person in black shoes and a long white apron is visible beside it. Finally, that apron-wearing person leans in toward the toilet holding a Clorox bottle, preparing to clean it, with the wooden seat raised and the toilet centered against the dark wood wall.
